goals: Store a preference about vintage film projection settings for future reference
Search for previously stored information about a specific film or projector type
Review all stored memories to see what has been remembered
Remove outdated or irrelevant memories that are no longer needed

user_agent_config.personality: Detail-oriented and nostalgic, with a passion for preserving vintage cinema equipment. Prefers practical, hands-on conversations about film projection.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about vintage film projectors, cinema history, and projection techniques. Does not know about mem0 or any memory management tools - treats this as a natural conversation about remembering things.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored a preference, retrieved relevant past information, reviewed their stored memories, and cleaned up any unnecessary ones.
